title: Mastering Conflict and Negotiation for Emerging Leaders in Logistics
purpose: Emerging leaders in logistics often face conflicts across supply chains, teams, and client relationships. This program equips them with negotiation strategies, conflict resolution frameworks, and real-world case studies tailored to logistics.

facilitator.name: Jyoti Gupta
facilitator.experience: Founder - Sculpt Your Style Consulting Training | Coaching | Refinement.
facilitator.description:
Credentials: Trainer, Coach, Motivational Speaker, Co Author. Certified Organisational Development Professional. Certified POSH Trainer. Certified Corporate Trainer. Certified Soft Skills Trainer. Certified Life Skills Trainer. Former Client Relations and Logistics Professional.

Jyoti believes that true development comes from within - when individuals are equipped with the mindset, skillset, and presence to succeed. Her approach blends introspection with implementation, ensuring growth that is both personal and professional. She combines the art of personal transformation with the science of workplace success, delivering high-impact programs that build capability.

Expertise Includes:
• Employee Training & Development
• Communication Skills Training
• Behavioural Skills Training
• Soft Skills Training
• Corporate Etiquette Training
• Self Enhancement
• Style & Etiquette Coaching
• Career Readiness Training
• Stage Speaking Training
• Executive Presence & Leadership
• Customer Service Training
• Sales Acceleration Training

Achievements Awards Certificates:
• Trainer’s Mastery Certified Soft Skills Trainer from National Institute of Skills Training, New Delhi, India
• POSH Certified Trainer. Prevention, Prohibition, and Redressal of sexual harassment of women at workplace POSH Act 2013, POSH Certified Trainer Concept of Living Charitable Trust, Gujarat, India
• Educator of the year 2023 from Namaste India Council of Educators (NICE) for outstanding contribution in the field of education
• Certificate of appreciation from Mentoria for being subject matter expert
• City Excellence Awards 2023 for making positive difference towards the community
• International Proud Womania Award 2023 for conducting motivational sessions
• Certificate of appreciation from Bhabad publication for being exceptional speaker and moderator
• Certificate of appreciation soft skills trainer summit from Leadership Academy

keyConcepts: Negotiation strategies, conflict resolution frameworks, emotional intelligence in logistics, cross-border challenges.
interactiveElements: Scenario-based quizzes, polls, structured role play, case studies.

modules.title: Module 1: Understanding Conflict in Logistics
modules.focus: Identifying sources of conflict and their impact on operations.
details: **Key Topics**: Types of conflict, conflict escalation model, emotional intelligence in logistics leadership.
**Interactive Activity**: Role-play: warehouse manager vs. transport coordinator over delayed shipments.

modules.title: Module 2: Negotiation Fundamentals for Leaders
modules.focus: Building negotiation skills for everyday logistics challenges.
details: **Key Topics**: Principles of win-win negotiation, BATNA, communication styles.
**Interactive Activity**: Simulation: Negotiating freight rates between NVOCC and shipper.

modules.title: Module 3: Advanced Strategies in Conflict Resolution
details: **Key Topics**: Mediation and arbitration, cross-border and cultural challenges, power dynamics.
**Interactive Activity**: Group exercise: Resolving a three-way dispute between supplier, freight forwarder, and retailer.

modules.title: Module 4: Leading with Influence and Collaboration
modules.focus: Embedding conflict management into leadership style.
details: **Key Topics**: Collaborative leadership, building trust, turning conflict into innovation.
**Interactive Activity**: Peer coaching: Sharing personal conflict experiences and reframing them.

title: International Freight Forwarding & Contract Logistics Training
purpose: Equip logistics aspirants with industry knowledge & practical tools for success.
keyConcepts: Freight forwarder vs carrier vs NVOCC, Incoterms, customs clearance, contract logistics, outsourcing & performance metrics
interactiveElements: Case studies, role play, scenario mapping, quick quizzes

modules.title: Day 1
details: **What is International Freight Forwarding?**: Definitions, 3PL vs 4PL, real-world example (Guided Discussion + Case Study)
**Sea Freight Basics**: Shipping line collaboration, Incoterms, container types, port challenges (Visual Walkthrough + Scenario Mapping)

modules.title: Day 2
details: **Air Freight Basics**: Airline coordination, AWB, cargo types, urgency vs cost trade-offs (Role Play + Flowchart Exercise)
**Customs Clearance & Contract Logistics**: HS codes, documentation, bonded warehouses, contract logistics overview (Mini Lecture + Q&A)
**Wrap-Up & Feedback**: Key takeaways, feedback, next steps (Open Discussion)

title: Enhancing Executive Presence for Mid & Senior-Level Logistics Professionals
purpose: In the fast-paced, high-stakes world of logistics and supply chain management, technical expertise alone is not enough. This intensive 2-day virtual workshop is designed to help logistics professionals strengthen their executive presence, sharpen communication impact, and lead with authority and authenticity in high-pressure environments.

keyConcepts: Gravitas under pressure, Communicating with authority, Strategic stakeholder influence, Executive body language, Difficult conversations
interactiveElements: Facilitator-led interactive delivery, Real logistics case studies, Polls & reflection exercises, Live coaching feedback, Executive communication drills

modules.title: DAY 1 - Module 1: What is Executive Presence in Logistics Leadership?
details: Presence vs Position: Why authority is perceived, not declared
Leadership moments in logistics (crisis calls, escalations, negotiations)

modules.title: DAY 1 - Module 2: Gravitas Under Pressure
details: Staying composed during shipment delays, client escalations

modules.title: DAY 2 - Module 4: Strategic Stakeholder Influence
details: Negotiation presence with vendors and partners

modules.title: DAY 2 - Module 5: Executive Body Language & Virtual Presence
DAY 2 - Module 6: Difficult Conversations & Assertive Leadership

title: Safe Workplaces, Stronger Operations: POSH Awareness for Logistics Professionals
purpose: The program is designed to create awareness, strengthen accountability, and promote a culture of dignity and respect across operational and field-based roles in corporate logistics environments.

keyConcepts: POSH Act 2013, Workplace Dignity, Logistics-Specific Risk Scenarios, Internal Committee (IC) & Complaint Process, Bystanders Role
interactiveElements: Interactive polls, Scenario-based discussions, Chat participation, Practical examples from logistics environments, Real-time engagement tools

modules.title: Module 1 & 2: Understanding Workplace Dignity & Legal Framework
modules.focus: Importance of safe work environments and legal definitions
details: Definition of sexual harassment (Forms, Hostile work environment, Quid pro quo)

modules.title: Module 3: Logistics-Specific Risk Scenarios
details: Power dynamics and client boundary violations

modules.title: Module 4 & 5: Internal Committee Process & Case Study
details: Who can file, Timelines, Inquiry procedure
Decision-making and response analysis on realistic logistics-based case scenario

modules.title: Module 6, 7 & 8: Role of Managers, Bystanders & Conclusion
